title: AAI Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 95 Apprentice Posts
description: The Airports Authority of India (AAI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 95 Graduate Apprentices, Diploma Apprentices, and ITI/ Trade Apprentices. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, Diploma in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Civil Engineering, and ITI can apply for the AAI Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can...
